name: external_temperature
meaning: outside temperature; bit7 means negative Celsius

name: steering_panel_key
meaning: steering wheel and panel keys; status 0 release, >=1 press/repeat

name: air_conditioning
meaning: climate popup; AC/dual/auto/air direction/defog/recirc bits in FLAGS

name: vehicle_doors
meaning: bit0 LF, bit1 RF, bit2 LR, bit3 RR, bit4 trunk, bit5 hood

name: vehicle_sunroof_candidate
meaning: experimental 0x40 from C-CAN 0x541 DATA[7]&0x02; not decoded by public RZC Korea
source: local CAN log; TEYES support unknown

name: ac_climate_status
meaning: show climate panel/status; public code comment references 2017 KX5

name: reverse_local
meaning: reverse off/on used by programmer firmware

name: setting
meaning: settings command; not decoded in public manager

name: host_status_usb
meaning: USB media numeric status; photo shows seconds incrementing

name: valid_unknown
meaning: valid checksum in user WR photo but not present in public RZC Korea protocol
